data.title: USDC Circulation Increases by 1 Billion in Recent Week
data.description: According to PANews, official data reveals that Circle issued approximately 3.6 billion USDC and redeemed around 2.6 billion USDC in the week ending March 20, 2025. This activity resulted in a net increase of about 1 billion USDC in circulation. The total circulation of USDC now stands at 59.2 billion, with reserves amounting to approximately $59.5 billion. Of these reserves, around $7.2 billion is held in cash, while the Circle Reserve Fund holds approximately $52.3 billion.

data.title: Swiss National Bank Launches Pilot Wholesale CBDC for Tokenized Securities
data.description:
According to PANews, the Swiss National Bank (SNB) has initiated a pilot program for its wholesale central bank digital currency (wCBDC) to facilitate the settlement of tokenized securities on the SIX Digital Exchange (SDX). The SNB's recent annual report highlights this initiative along with other related activities, including the exploration of a synthetic CBDC, a private tokenized currency backed by central bank funds.

The SNB describes this tokenized private currency as one of three options under consideration for distributed ledger technology (DLT) settlement. The other options include the wCBDC and a connection between the SIC payment system and DLT systems, which was previously tested in the Project Helvetia CBDC exploration.

The Swiss central bank emphasized that it has not committed to issuing a permanent wCBDC and remains neutral regarding the adoption of any specific solution, focusing instead on evaluating various options at this stage.

data.title: Ripple calls on SEC to ditch enforcement-first approach after key legal victory
data.description:
Crypto exchange Ripple asks the SEC to focus on setting clear regulatory guidance for crypto companies and abandon past enforcement strategies.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ripple-urges-sec-to-rethink-strategy/

data.title: Planet Lunch News
Bithumb will list Across Protocol (ACX) Korean Won trading pairs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that South Korean cryptocurrency exchange Bithumb will launch the Across Protocol (ACX) Korean won trading pair, which is expected to open for trading at 5 pm on March 22.

data.title: Bitcoin's On-Chain Losses Suggest Reduced Selling Pressure
data.description: According to PANews, cryptocurrency analyst Ali Martinez revealed on the X platform that Bitcoin's on-chain traders are experiencing an average loss rate of 13.86%. Historically, this level indicates that selling pressure may be diminishing.

data.title: Polygon Price To Drop To $0.04 Amid Bearish Market Outlook?
data.description:
Polygon price has recently given indications that it may just be entering a bear market. The price has failed to hold several crucial support levels support and this has led some analysts to expect the cryptocurrency to drop to $0.04. Polygon Price Breaks Below $0
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/22/polygon-price-to-drop-to-0-04-amid-bearish-market-outlook/

data.title: Nick Tomaino: Ethereum has become the dominant ecosystem for tokenizing real-world assets
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Nick Tomaino, founder of 1confirmation, said in an article that the tokenization of real assets (RWA) is accelerating, covering multiple fields such as government bonds, stocks, bonds, private credit, commodities, real estate, etc. Among them, Ethereum has become the dominant ecosystem for the tokenization of real assets.

data.title: Ethereum Leads in Real-World Asset Tokenization
data.description: According to Odaily, Nick Tomaino, founder of 1confirmation, has stated that the tokenization of real-world assets (RWA) is rapidly advancing. This trend encompasses various sectors, including government bonds, stocks, bonds, private credit, commodities, and real estate. Ethereum has emerged as the leading ecosystem for the tokenization of these real-world assets.

data.title: Changpeng Zhao Promotes BNB Chain with New Initiatives
data.description:
Changpeng Zhao promotes BNB Chain with new initiatives, boosting trading volumes and investor interest.
source: https://coincu.com/327894-changpeng-zhao-bnb-chain-initiatives
